title: No input validation on createBooking
failing_tests: should reject booking with missing petName
should reject booking with negative nights
fix_description: Add validation: require petName (string), nights (positive integer), pricePerNight (positive number)

title: Off-by-one in totalPrice calculation
fix_description: Change nights+1 to nights in totalPrice calculation

title: getBooking fails with string ID from URL params
failing_tests: should find booking by string ID from URL params
fix_description: Coerce id to Number() before Map.get()

title: listBookings sorts oldest first instead of newest
fix_description: Change sort comparator from a.id - b.id to b.id - a.id

title: Can cancel already-cancelled booking
failing_tests: should not allow cancelling an already cancelled booking
fix_description: Add guard: if booking.status === 'cancelled', throw error

title: Revenue includes cancelled bookings
failing_tests: should exclude cancelled bookings from revenue
fix_description: Filter to confirmed bookings before reducing revenue

title: Missing health endpoint
fix_description: Add GET /health endpoint returning { status: 'ok', uptime: process.uptime() }
